codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature scope: Series page links now target ?tab=series, Generate page reads result/topic/pillar query params, and ScriptGenerator initializes output/topic/pillar from those params. The tab param is honored on initial load via activeTab initialization from searchParams.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill requires agent-browser for UI-flow verification, but this worker validated only with build/lint/grep and static code checks. This suggests either enforcement is weak or the skill should clarify when browser verification may be skipped.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md ("Required Skills: agent-browser" and "Manual verification ... use agent-browser"). Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId cc4f5711-6928-408c-b154-bdfb7fc800a0 shows no agent-browser usage and handoff verification contains only npm run build, npm run lint, and rg checks.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit ea7a837b6b90e4487ac91ccdd15d1d4d7bef17ce for feature fix-series-nav-and-ideas-conversion.
